OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: This IP creates records for contract, contract payment agreement and Preventive Care Agreement
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: CreatePreventiveCareAgreementRecords

omniProcessElements.name: RA_SavedData
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "useFormulas" : true, "additionalOutput" : { "PCACreated" : "=IF(%DM_CreatePCAForNotLocumTypeOfRate:error% == \"OK\" || %DM_CreatePCAForLocum:error% == \"OK\", true, false)", "CPACreated" : "=IF(%DM_CreateContractPaymentAgreement:error% == \"OK\" , true, false)", "ShowShiftError" : "=IF(%RA_ValidateRateForShiftCoverage:rateValidated% == \"false\", true, false)" }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ResponseAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DM_CreatePCAForLocum
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "LB_LocumCodeSet:PCAsList", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMCreatePreventiveContractAgreement", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction3", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SV_LocumPCAListWithData
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "FILTER(LIST(%locumRateList:LocumRateData%), 'type == \"' + %locumCodeSetData:Name% + '\" && value != \"\"') != null", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "PCA" : { "contractPaymentAgreementId" : "=IF(ISBLANK(DRE_FetchContractAndCPA:cpaRec),%DM_CreateContractPaymentAgreement:ContractPaymentAgreement_1:Id%,%DRE_FetchContractAndCPA:cpaRec:Id%)", "Rate" : "=IF(%locumCodeSetData:Name% == \"Shifts Requested\", \"\", VALUELOOKUP(FILTER(LIST(%locumRateList:LocumRateData%), 'type == \"' + %locumCodeSetData:Name% + '\" && value != \"\"'), \"value\"))", "ShiftsRequested" : "=IF(%locumCodeSetData:Name% == \"Shifts Requested\", VALUELOOKUP(FILTER(LIST(%locumRateList:LocumRateData%), 'type == \"' + %locumCodeSetData:Name% + '\" && value != \"\"'), \"value\"), \"\")", "UnitOfMeasure" : "=IF(%locumCodeSetData:Name% == \"Shifts Requested\", \"per Month\",\"per Hour\")", "Type" : { "value" : "=%locumCodeSetData:Id%" }, "FacilityTitle" : "%ListOfFacilityTitleIds%", "BonusMeasureType" : "=\"NA\"", "TargetMeasurePercent" : "=0", "BonusPayout" : "=0" } }, "responseJSONPath" : "PCA", "responseJSONNode" : "PCAList", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues9", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SV_LocumRateData
DM_CreatePCAForShiftcoverageChange
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%RA_ValidateRateForShiftCoverage:rateValidated% == \"true\"", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "contractPaymentAgreementId" : "=IF(ISBLANK(DRE_FetchContractAndCPA:cpaRec),%DM_CreateContractPaymentAgreement:ContractPaymentAgreement_1:Id%,%DRE_FetchContractAndCPA:cpaRec:Id%)", "FacilityTitle" : "%ListOfFacilityTitleIds%", "Rate" : "%Rate%", "UnitOfMeasure" : "%UnitOfMeasure%", "BonusMeasureType" : "=\"NA\"", "TargetMeasurePercent" : "=0", "BonusPayout" : "=0", "Type" : "=%ListOfType%", "typeOfRate" : "=%typeOfRate%", "Notes" : "=%Notes%", "OverrideProhibited" : "=%OverrideProhibited%", "Shift" : "=LIST(FILTER(LIST(%shifts%), 'selected == true '))", "TimeType" : "%timeType%", "dailyEncounterThreshold" : "%dailyEncounterThreshold%", "dailyEncounterPayCap" : "%dailyEncounterPayCap%", "targetPlanRate" : "%targetPlanRate%", "monthsProviderGuarantee" : "%monthsProviderGuarantee%", "monthsStartupGuarantee" : "%monthsStartupGuarantee%", "rVUMetricType" : "%rVUMetricType%", "Payments" : "%Payments%", "PayrollCycle" : "%PayrollCycle%", "DurationMonths" : "%DurationMonths%", "WorkCommitmentPerMonth" : "%WorkCommitmentPerMonth%", "WorkCommitmentFrequency" : "%WorkCommitmentFrequency%", "RepaymentTerms" : "%RepaymentTerms%", "stipendTier" : "%stipendTier%", "adminHours" : "%adminHours%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMCreatePreventiveContractAgreement", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction3", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: RA_ValidateRateForShiftCoverage
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "ShiftCoverageChange" : "%isShiftCoverageChange%", "ContextId" : "%ContextId%", "Rate" : "%Rate%", "UnitOfMeasure" : "%UnitOfMeasure%", "ListOfFacilityTitleIds" : "%ListOfFacilityTitleIds%", "shifts" : "%shifts%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "remoteClass" : "CheckRatesForServiceAccFacility", "remoteOptions" : { }, "remoteMethod" : "ValidateRate", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "RemoteAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DM_CreateContractPaymentAgreement
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISBLANK(DRE_FetchContractAndCPA:cpaRec)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "accountName" : "=%DRE_FetchContractAndCPA:contractRec:AccountName%", "contractId" : "=%ContextId%", "accountId" : "=%DRE_FetchContractAndCPA:contractRec:AccountId%", "agreementType" : "=\"Preventive Care Agreement\"", "typeOfRate" : "=%typeOfRate%", "Status" : "=\"Draft\"", "contractNumber" : "=%DRE_FetchContractAndCPA:contractRec:ContractNumber%", "pncId" : "%pncId%", "globalAccountId" : "=%DRFetchServiceAccountDetails:pncRec:Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__r:Account:Global_Account_ID__c%", "StartDate" : "=FORMATDATETIME(%DRE_FetchContractAndCPA:contractRec:StartDate%,\"yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss\",\"America/Chicago\")", "HPFNumber" : "=%DRFetchServiceAccountDetails:pncRec:Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__r:HPF_Number__c%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMCreateContractPaymentAgreement", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DM_CreatePCAForNotLocumTypeOfRate
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%typeOfRate% != \"Locum\" && %isShiftCoverageChange% != \"true\"\n", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "contractPaymentAgreementId" : "=IF(ISBLANK(DRE_FetchContractAndCPA:cpaRec),%DM_CreateContractPaymentAgreement:ContractPaymentAgreement_1:Id%,%DRE_FetchContractAndCPA:cpaRec:Id%)", "FacilityTitle" : "%ListOfFacilityTitleIds%", "Rate" : "%Rate%", "UnitOfMeasure" : "%UnitOfMeasure%", "BonusMeasureType" : "=\"NA\"", "TargetMeasurePercent" : "=0", "BonusPayout" : "=0", "Type" : "=%ListOfType%", "typeOfRate" : "=%typeOfRate%", "Notes" : "=%Notes%", "OverrideProhibited" : "=%OverrideProhibited%", "Shift" : "=LIST(FILTER(LIST(%shifts%), 'selected == true '))", "TimeType" : "%timeType%", "dailyEncounterThreshold" : "%dailyEncounterThreshold%", "dailyEncounterPayCap" : "%dailyEncounterPayCap%", "targetPlanRate" : "%targetPlanRate%", "monthsProviderGuarantee" : "%monthsProviderGuarantee%", "monthsStartupGuarantee" : "%monthsStartupGuarantee%", "rVUMetricType" : "%rVUMetricType%", "Payments" : "%Payments%", "PayrollCycle" : "%PayrollCycle%", "DurationMonths" : "%DurationMonths%", "WorkCommitmentPerMonth" : "%WorkCommitmentPerMonth%", "WorkCommitmentFrequency" : "%WorkCommitmentFrequency%", "RepaymentTerms" : "%RepaymentTerms%", "stipendTier" : "%stipendTier%", "adminHours" : "%adminHours%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMCreatePreventiveContractAgreement", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction3", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DRE_FetchContractAndCPA
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "ContextId" : "%ContextId%", "typeOfRate" : "%typeOfRate%", "pncId" : "=IF(ISBLANK(%pncId%),\"$Vlocity.NULL\",%pncId%)" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DREFetchContractAndCPA", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DRFetchServiceAccountDetails
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(pncId)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "pncId" : "%pncId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRFetchServiceAccountDetails", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : { }, "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : true, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "ttlMinutes" : 5, "mockResponseMap" : { } }
